creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
Since php80-openssl was removed (https://www.freshports.org/commit.php?message_id=e8d9493812a510f7c1cc94632836e1d5731de250) because OpenSSL is now part of lang/php80 itself, FTPS has stopped working. It shows up as "Disabled" in phpinfo(); FTP and OPENSSL are clearly part of the php modules, but since there are no settables or toggleables, switching FTPS on explicitly appears to be a no-go. A client stated that it first stopped working for them on the 16th (it is not a daily thing for them), so that tracks nicely with this change.

FreeBSD 13-6
